title: Premium biometric onboarding hero image
user_brief: Create a premium enterprise hero image for a biometric onboarding platform.

visual_parameters.composition: clean hero layout with negative space

prompt: Create a premium enterprise hero image for a biometric onboarding platform. The visual should feel trustworthy, human, clean, and production-ready. Use a modern B2B aesthetic, soft studio lighting, refined details, and a clean hero composition with negative space for headline text. Keep the mood calm and credible, suitable for a landing page hero section.
negative_prompt: Avoid cyberpunk, hacker visuals, surveillance feeling, dystopian lighting, glitch effects, aggressive neon, fake UI text, and stock photo handshakes.
evaluation_criteria: Does not look like generic AI stock art
